originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&len` is never used.

presenceCondition:
(and (= ENABLE_FEATURE_HTTPD_GZIP false)
     (= ENABLE_FEATURE_HTTPD_BASIC_AUTH true)
     (= BB_MMU true))
model:
(define-fun BB_MMU () Bool
  true)
(define-fun ENABLE_FEATURE_HTTPD_GZIP () Bool
  false)
(define-fun ENABLE_FEATURE_HTTPD_BASIC_AUTH () Bool
  true)
reasoning: When GZIP=F, content_gzip is not declared (L5-7 '#ifdef ENABLE_FEATURE_HTTPD_GZIP' skipped). L35 inside send_headers() uses content_gzip outside any #ifdef → undeclared identifier compile error. This configuration is non-compilable. Classification: FALSE.
